headline: How global fiscal policy is reacting to the recent energy shock
summary: Investing.com -- As global energy markets navigate a fresh wave of supply disruptions, the fiscal "safety net" that cushioned consumers during the 2022-23 crisis is notably thinner.

raw.headline: How global fiscal policy is reacting to the recent energy shock

headline: South Korea nears Kazakhstan oil deal as Middle East supply risks mount
summary: Investing.com -- South Korea is on the verge of securing a significant crude oil supply agreement with Kazakhstan, as the nation moves aggressively to diversify its energy sources away from the volatile Middle East.

raw.headline: South Korea nears Kazakhstan oil deal as Middle East supply risks mount

headline: Japan targets Asian oil alliance as supply bottlenecks persist
summary: Investing.com -- Japan will seek to deepen strategic cooperation with its Asian neighbors to secure the crude oil supplies necessary for regional manufacturing, Economy Minister Ryosei Akazawa stated during an NHK broadcast on Sunday.

headline: Why are Japanese equities so resilient despite the Middle East war?
summary: Investing.com -- Japanese equity markets may have reached a definitive bottom following the announcement of a two-week ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran.
